title: Valid Parameters
description: Valid game parameters for the roar-swr application.

addNoResponse.description: Indicates if trials with no response should be added.

skipInstructions.description: Indicates if instructions should be skipped.

storyOption.description: Option for the story mode used.

userMode.description: Mode of the user during the task.

properties.addNoResponse: addNoResponse must be a boolean or null.
properties.audioFeedbackOption: audioFeedbackOption must be a string with a value of 'random', 'neutral', 'binary', or null.
properties.consent: consent must be a boolean or null.
properties.lng: lng must be a string with a value of 'en', 'es', 'it', 'pt', or null.
properties.numAdaptive: numAdaptive must be a number between 0 and 1000 or null.
properties.numNew: numNew must be a number between 0 and 1000 or null.
properties.numValidated: numValidated must be a number between 0 and 1000 or null.
properties.recruitment: recruitment must be a string with a value of 'otherLabs', 'school', 'parentSignup', 'redcap', 'pilot', 'sona', 'demo', or null.
properties.scoringVersion: scoringVersion must be one of the following numbers 1 (swr-es), 6, or 7 (swr), or null.
properties.skipInstructions: skipInstructions must be a boolean or null.
properties.storyOption: storyOption must be a string with a value of 'grade-based', a boolean, or null.
properties.userMode: userMode must be a string with a value of 'shortAdaptive', 'fullItemBank', 'presentationExpShort', 'fullRandom', 'shortRandom', 'shortRandom80', 'shortAdaptiveEasyBlock', 'presentationExp2Conditions', 'presentationExp', or null.
